inputs.description: Implement Task 8 from the plan: Remove deprecated source and test files. Remove: intent_agent.py, analytical_router.py, formatter.py, narrative_agent.py, thematic_context.py, clarification.py, curator.py, exploration_agent.py, llm_compiler.py, execute.py. Remove associated test files. Clean up commented-out imports in app/api/main.py. Check scripts/query/service.py for broken imports. Run full test suite to verify no regressions. Use git rm for each file. Commit with descriptive message.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/app/test_scholar_evidence.py -x 2>&1 | tail -40
